summary: AI Grading System testing completed successfully. All backend APIs working (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI verified - Gradebook renamed, AI Generator modal functional, AI Grading page accessible, Student Assignment page public. Fixed critical bug in ai_grading.py (MongoDB truth value testing).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: ai_grading.py had 'if not db:' which fails with MongoDB - changed to 'if db is None:'
Gradebook.js correctly renamed to 'Assignments & Gradebook' (Tareas y Calificaciones)
AI Generator modal has all required fields: topic, subject, grade level, difficulty, question types
Student Assignment page correctly hides correct answers from students
AI Grading page shows stats cards and submissions list
Navigation sidebar shows 'AI Grading' with NEW badge
seed_data_creation: Created test user, session, class, and category for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Grading System fully tested and working. Backend APIs: /api/ai-grading/stats, /api/ai-grading/generate-assignment, /api/ai-grading/assignments (CRUD), /api/ai-grading/student/{token} (public), /api/ai-grading/submissions. Frontend: Gradebook page renamed, AI Generator modal works, AI Grading page shows stats and submissions, Student Assignment page is public.

details.generate_assignment: PASS - AI generates questions with Claude Sonnet 4.6
details.student_public_access: PASS - No auth required for student pages

details.ai_generator_modal: PASS - All fields present (topic, subject, grade, difficulty, question types)
details.ai_grading_page: PASS - Stats cards and submissions list visible
details.student_assignment_page: PASS - Public access, questions displayed, submit button works
details.navigation_sidebar: PASS - AI Grading link with NEW badge visible

bug_fixed.issue: MongoDB database objects do not support truth value testing
